priority.full_text:
Google hid a fully working flight simulator inside Google Earth back in 2007 and never told anyone.

You unlocked it with a secret keystroke: Ctrl+Alt+A. No menu, no announcement. One user stumbled onto it, the combo spread, and it got popular enough that Google made it official
priority.summary: Google在2007年的Google Earth中隐藏了完整飞行模拟器，需要Ctrl+Alt+A快捷键解锁。这个隐藏功能从未官方宣布，直到用户发现后才逐渐流行，最终Google才将其正式化。
viral_signals: 反常识/意外性：科技巨头的隐藏彩蛋
